## Meeting Purpose

[To reorganize Marcel's calendar for the upcoming week and discuss logistics for future events.](https://fathom.video/share/w94YByaKvSk4yABKZhrsxo6gZdVjCs-r?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel needs to block out significant time for workshop preparation (DeepGram on Friday, Ramp on following Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/w94YByaKvSk4yABKZhrsxo6gZdVjCs-r?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

  - [Travel plans include a camping trip and a flight to New York on Oct 8th, requiring careful calendar management](https://fathom.video/share/w94YByaKvSk4yABKZhrsxo6gZdVjCs-r?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
